name: accounting firms managing 5–15 clients/month tool
description: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients/month, delays in financial reporting cause cash flow gaps. We automate the monthly close process instead of manual tracking and reporting processes.
problem_solved: delays in financial reporting and client notifications
